title.en: It didn't take long for him to come to the trea...

content.en:
Soon, the Silent Dao Ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains got the order to cut off the Black Mountain as soon as possible.

It didn't take long for him to come to the treasure land where Ye Tian was.

Although there are many powerhouses at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor here, there is even the existence of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Peak.

However, as long as he was fast, these Dao Ancestors at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor would not be able to stop him.

"With my strength, I should be able to use this Infinite Dao Ancestor of the Eightfold Primordial Beginning in an instant!" thought to himself.

So, he was ready to do it.

Soon, he approached Ye Tian with a hidden immeasurable dao mastery technique.

He felt that it was impossible for Ye Tian to perceive his existence, even if it was a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor like the Nine-Fold Building Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor, it was difficult to detect his existence.

However, what he didn't know was that he had already been discovered by Ye Tian.

......

"Huh?"

Ye Tian's copying talent has been turned on, and at this moment he feels that something is approaching him, although the other party is very deeply hidden, and even the copying talent can't be directly spied on.

You can copy the talent, but you can know that there is a creature approaching, but you can't penetrate the other party to see the talent information.

So, Ye Tian notified the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor as soon as possible.

Although he wasn't worried about the fall of his two bodies, if they all fell, others would know that he had multiple bodies, which would undoubtedly greatly reduce his ability to save his life!

"I wonder if the space-time golden shuttle can save his life?"

Ye Tian urged this space-time golden shuttle that had been awarded to him by the Nine-Story Building before.

This artifact allows him to travel back to the Nine-Story Building, and it also comes with a shield.

But how well the shield was defended, he didn't know.

At the moment when the other party was about to make a move, Ye Tian directly urged the space-time golden shuttle.

In a flash.

The space-time golden shuttle connected to the nine-story building, wanting to shuttle back with him.

However.

"The Nine-Story Building's Space-Time Golden Shuttle, it's indeed a very good primordial Dao treasure, but it's a pity that it can't save your life!"

The Silent Dao Ancestor also urged a forbidden primordial Dao treasure, directly suppressed the space-time golden shuttle, and hit it with all his might, exerting his own immeasurable Dao control technique - Silent Sword!

Rumble!!!

The Silent Sword directly penetrated the shield of the space-time golden shuttle, and caused one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies to shatter and turn into nothingness.

"Not dead yet!"

The Lonely Dao Ancestor is not panicking, and if he can't kill with one sword, then come to the second sword.

But at this moment, the surrounding time and space froze, and even he was suppressed by a dark force.

"Nine-Fold Ancestral !!"

The Lonely Dao Ancestor was stunned.

How could the Ninefold Origin Ancestor come so quickly, even if Ye Tian asked for help, he couldn't come here so quickly at the speed of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor!

Unless there was a Ninefold Origin Ancestor who had already been in charge of cutting off Black Mountain, and Ye Tian asked for help in advance, he had hope to come so soon.

"Run!"

He didn't continue to attack.

Because under the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor's Immeasurable Dao Domain, it was impossible for him to kill Ye Tian, unless his Immeasurable Dao could shatter the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor's Immeasurable Dao Domain, but that was impossible!

With the escape type treasures and his own escape type immeasurable dao control skills, as long as the Ninefold Origin Ancestor who came was not too strong, he had hope of escaping.

But soon, he despaired.

"Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor !!"

He saw the figure of this Ninefold Origin Ancestor and recognized it, this was clearly a terrifying existence at the peak of the Ninefold Ancestor in the Nine-Fold Building, it was the Ninefold Ancestor whose life level had broken more than 100, and in the entire Nine-Fold Building, his strength could be ranked in the top twenty!

Such an existence actually appeared here, let alone him, even if he broke through his cultivation in an instant now and reached the realm of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, he would not be able to escape!

I saw that he had done all the means to escape, but his body still did not move a single bit, and the whole person seemed to be frozen.

The next moment.

A big hand grabbed it and directly crushed the Silent Dao Ancestor.

At this point, this half-step ninefold ancestor was directly killed!

At this time, although Ye Tian's other copy body did not fall, it was also in his hands, and the original Dao Treasure Time and Space Golden Shuttle was seriously damaged.

"Thank you Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian and said, "Cultivate well!"

Immediately, he departed, without saying much.

In fact, when Shi Chao Dao Ancestor appeared here, he was also very shocked.

But it wasn't long before he learned the truth from the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

It turned out that he was practicing here, and the two replica bodies were together, so the Nine Stories Tower judged that there would be an attack.

Coupled with the special nature of the truncated Black Mountain, the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor stayed in the depths of the Truncated Yellow Building that cut off the Black Mountain.

After all, at the level of the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, there is too little room for improvement, so wasting a little time is nothing.

It just so happened that Ye Tian urged the space-time golden shuttle in advance and asked for help, so that the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor could come in an instant.

......

Ten Mountains.

The news of the fall of the Silent Dao Ancestor was known to them, and the Void Dao Ancestor and the Haoyang Dao Ancestor were very annoyed.

A half-step ninefold ancestor who is good at escaping and is at the top of his combat power is also an extremely important combat power for the Ten Dao Mountains!

Although the Silent Dao Ancestor did not have the potential to be promoted to a Ninefold Origin Ancestor, it was no less valuable than a Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and as a result, he was pinched to death by the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor!

"I made a mistake this time, I didn't expect that guy from Shi Xuan Dao Ancestor to be cutting off the Yellow Building!" sighed Wu Xuan Dao Ancestor.

"There's no way, the other party is hiding in the truncated Yellow Building, no matter how much we investigate, we can't find it, we can only say that the Lonely Dao Ancestor is too unlucky! Fortunately, the Lonely Dao Ancestor is one of the secret forces of our Ten Dao Mountains, and the Nine-Story Building can't find out the identity of the Lonely Dao Ancestor, otherwise the Nine-Story Building will have to trouble us!" Haoyang Dao Ancestor said.

"Then continue to assassinate the Endless Dao Ancestor?"

Wuxu Dao Ancestor asked.

Haoyang Dao Ancestor shook his head, "No, I can't do it for the time being, Shi Chao Dao Ancestor is nearby, the risk is too great, even if the Nine Primordial Ancestor makes a move, it is not safe." "

"Then I won't do anything to the Endless Dao Ancestor for the time being, just wait for the opportunity!"

Void Dao Ancestor also nodded.

......

After such an incident, the other top forces originally wanted to attack Ye Tian, but they all gave up one by one at this moment.

And Ye Tian also ushered in more long years of penance, and his own comprehension of the prototype of the Immeasurable Dao became deeper and deeper.

Finally, on this day after the nine billion Origin Domain Era years, he finally raised the Infinite Dao Prototype to the Xiaocheng realm.

After the Infinite Dao Prototype reached the Xiaocheng realm, the effect of this red mountain peak on Ye Tian was not as great as before, but it was still very good.

Therefore, Ye Tian still continued to practice here.

Before you know it, billions of years have passed.

this day.

The red mountain suddenly shook, and a crack opened in an instant.
